spoilers.text: [#ONEPIECE1182] The attack that Imu is using called the Tzitzimitl is based off what is said to be celestial deity from Aztec mythology. Usually have a physical description of skeletal female and with skull & crossbones. Also mention of them connected with demons and devils. WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1182 New spoilers(wont name the source this time since they probably don´t want it 👍) Also little correction: - It is not the WG in general but Kilingham and Sommers who fear Zaza. — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2052138749794922928#m
